Types

BufferConsumer = proc (x: openArray[char]): int
returns number of characters consumed set to nil after returning negative Source   Edit   
HoloWriter = object
  buffer*: string
  bufferConsumer*: BufferConsumer
  freeBefore*: int
  flushPos*: int
  flushLocks*: int
